SEARCH
Module overrungl.opengl
Package overrungl.opengl

Interface GL31C

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
All Known Subinterfaces:
GL, GLLegacy
public interface GL31C extends overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
The OpenGL 3.1 core profile functions.

These extensions are promoted in this version:

  • GL_ARB_copy_buffer
  • GL_ARB_texture_rectangle
  • GL_ARB_uniform_buffer_object
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
